name: Lillie and the Chips
short_description: Soar through the skies of Lillie's dreams, collecting tasty chips while avoiding the nasty clouds. It's a one-button jump-based endless runner, built for quick sessions that is easy to play, but hard to master! Have what it takes to achieve the highest score? Probably not—but good luck anyways.
detailed_description:
In this snack-filled overcast adventure, Lillie’s alter dream-go takes to the skies to eat as many chips as possible. In doing so, she is tasked with evading the nasty clouds surrounding them.
"Lillie and the Chips" is a one-button, jump based endless runner. It's easy to play, but hard to master. Whether it's a short-casual session or a long-score breaking session, the player is presented with: 

  • Multi-Layered Obstacles: Clouds appear at different altitudes, requiring careful navigation when collecting chips

  • Increasing Speed and Gravity: The longer you survive, the faster the speed and higher the gravity

  • Endless Gameplay: There is no finish line, only your own limits

  • Scoreboards: Compete with friends, local players, or everyone around the world

  • Hand-Drawn Art and Animation: Every last visual is crafted by human hands

  • Original Soundtrack: Immerse yourself in the dreamlike atmosphere

With our furry bandit's stomach submitting to gravity with each chip eaten, the weather calls for thrown controllers, broken phones, and screams of frustration. Yet, with its simple-yet-addictive gameplay, Lillie and the Chips is the bite-sized burst of endless chaos that will have you looking at it like your chip bag, thinking “just one more.”

reviews.review_text: Fun flap-em-up!  Art direction is cute, music is calming, and the controls are snappy and responsive!  Added a health mechanic to the game, meaning that you don't lose immediately on hitting an obstacle; makes it feel less frustrating than previous flap-em-ups I've tried.  Not a bad way to spend some time and a buck or two.
